_comment: Example API app settings for Azure Container Apps. In Azure, configuration is supplied via environment variables. ASP.NET Core maps a double underscore '__' in an env var name onto the ':' hierarchy separator, so the env var 'ConnectionStrings__Default' binds to configuration key 'ConnectionStrings:Default', 'Jwt__AccessSecret' -> 'Jwt:AccessSecret', etc. The JSON below mirrors the appsettings shape; when injecting into Container Apps use the flattened Section__Key form (see main.bicep). Secret values shown are placeholders — store real secrets as container app secrets / Key Vault references, never in source.
